yfinance.note: Primary for US/JP. Free, no API key. May rate-limit.

efinance.note: Primary for A-shares/HK. Free, no key. May block non-China IPs.

alpha_vantage.note: Secondary for US. 25 calls/day, 5 calls/min. Free API key required.

stooq.note: Universal fallback. Free, CSV-based. May have data delays.
